fields.description: Max enrolment submissions per IP per hour (on top of frappe's native 10/min). Blank = 20. Enforced when CRM Tatva Automation → Intake::RateLimit::enforcement is ON.
fields.label: Per IP / hour

fields.description: Max submissions per phone number per day. Blank = 3.
fields.label: Per phone / day

fields.description: clamd host. Blank = clamav (the compose service). Enable scanning via CRM Tatva Automation → Intake::File::screening.
fields.label: ClamAV Host

fields.description: What to do if the scanner is unreachable while screening is ON. block = reject the upload (safest); allow = accept it (magic-byte sniff still applies). Blank = block.
fields.label: If Scanner Unavailable
